hook_options: Five colours. One adapter. Zero compromise.
Royal Pop. Now on your wrist.

beats.line: Pocket watch to wrist in seconds.

caption_options.label: A
caption_options.caption:
40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Three numbers. One adapter built only for the Royal Pop.

The Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered for the exact 40.35mm case, with a 0.7mm retaining lip and 22mm lug width. FKM rubber. Five premium colourways—Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso.

Pre-Order Now to secure yours. Limited stock.

#ProjectWristPop #RoyalPop #WatchAdapter #EngineeringPrecision

Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

caption_options.label: B
caption_options.caption:
Your Royal Pop wasn’t made for this. Until now.

Cradle Adapter V1: 40.35mm exact fit, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lugs. FKM rubber. Five colourways—each designed to match the Royal Pop’s premium finish.

Pre-Order Now. Limited colourways available.

#WristPop #WatchAccessories #PrecisionEngineering #NoCompromises

Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

pieces.handoff_note_for_qa: Recommended caption A for its direct alignment with the primary angle (specs + colourways) and stronger emphasis on engineering precision. Caption B is more emotive but slightly softer on proof points. Both pass character limits and hook validation.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

_qa_approved_elements: Reel script beats (all lines ≤ 15 words, no hype language)
Recommended caption A (direct alignment with primary angle)
CTA: 'Pre-Order Now' (exact match to website truth)
Legal disclaimer included in both captions
All colourways listed match website truth
Specs verified: 40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lug, FKM rubber, 5 colourways
pieces._qa_visual_instruction: Use the reel script beats as the shot list. Prioritize macro shots of the 0.7mm retaining lip and 40.35mm measurement. Showcase all five colourways in a quick, high-energy montage. End with a smooth transition from pocket to wrist. Ensure on-screen text overlays match the 'on_screen_text' array exactly.
